2026-04-16FINFederal-Provincial Fiscal Arrangements ActOrder Approving the Entering into Agreements to amend the terms and conditions of the seven First Nations sales tax administration agreements (FNST Agreements) Order approving that the Minister of Finance, on behalf of the Government of Canada, enter into agreements to amend First Nations Sales Tax Administration Agreements with each of the seven First Nations.N/A
subject: Order Approving the Entering into Agreements to amend the terms and conditions of the seven First Nations sales tax administration agreements (FNST Agreements)
precis: Order approving that the Minister of Finance, on behalf of the Government of Canada, enter into agreements to amend First Nations Sales Tax Administration Agreements with each of the seven First Nations.
